brand-card-stack.label: Brand Card Stack
brand-card-stack.description: Interactive stacked media layout with one featured asset and 4–8 supporting assets (images or videos). Typically used as a hero-scale brand moment on landing pages.

slots.name: cards
slots.description: 5–9 child elements. Exactly one must have `data-featured="true"`. Others can be img, video, or containers wrapping an img.

attrs.name: data-featured
attrs.description: Applied to ONE child element (not the host) to mark it as the featured card. Required.

attrs.name: data-image-expand
attrs.description: When true, the featured card expands to a full-screen viewer on interaction.

brand-card-stack.notes: Hard min/max of 5–9 assets. Missing the data-featured child will fail to render correctly.

brand-logo-animation.label: Brand Chevron Animation
brand-logo-animation.description: Animated UMD chevron logo scroll element. Drop-in decorative brand motion — no slots or attributes.
brand-logo-animation.notes: Pure behavior component. Typically placed between sections as a scroll transition.
